notes: JSON is planner-ready and OOH-first: TV/radio entries are intended as optional add-ons around a selectedBillboard packages.
Only data present in the supplied files is treated as verified. Unknown or not-supplied fields are null.
Some recommendation/use-case fields are planner-oriented normalizations inferred from the verified station/package descriptions, geography, audience language, and coverage type.
JSON is planner-ready and OOH-first: these radio entries are intended as optional add-ons around a selectedBillboard packages.
Package pricing, values, spot counts, commitments and booking terms come from the supplied PDFs.
primaryLanguage, coverageType, coverageAreas and audienceSegments were enriched from public internet sources after extraction.
Audience segment arrays are planner-oriented normalizations based on source-described audiences and footprints, not audited audience taxonomies.
This file is the single planner broadcast seed source for TV and radio.

showHighlights.audienceSummary: Designed to resonate with a wide demographic spanning rural, peri-urban, and urban audiences.
Drama crossing elite and underclass social realities.
